entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important oil seed, food and cash crop in India, also known as peanut or Arachis hypogaea L.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing country and the largest exporter of groundnuts.

entities.name: EUROPEAN UNION
entities.description: A niche market for groundnuts with stringent regulations on aflatoxins.

entities.name: AFLATOXINS
entities.description: Toxins produced by fungi that lead to stringent trade regulations in markets like the European Union.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A group of saprophytic, soil-borne fungi that cause pre- and post-harvest aflatoxin contamination in groundnut.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of aflatoxins in groundnut during pre- and post-harvest stages caused by Aspergillus flavus.

entities.name: RISK AREA MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying and mapping geographical areas at risk of A. flavus infection.

entities.name: EXTENSIVE SURVEY
entities.description: A research approach used to assess A. flavus infection in groundnut across multiple states and seasons.

entities.name: GUJARAT
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: TAMIL NADU
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: KERALA
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: PUNJAB
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: HARYANA
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: WEST BENGAL
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: ODISHA
entities.description: A major groundnut-producing state in India.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: One of the seasons during which groundnut pod samples were collected for infection assessment.

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON
entities.description: One of the seasons during which groundnut pod samples were collected for infection assessment.

entities.name: RISK LEVELS
entities.description: Categorization of districts into safe, acceptable, moderate, and high-risk areas based on kernel infection.

entities.name: KERNEL INFECTION
entities.description: The percentage of groundnut kernels infected by Aspergillus flavus.

entities.name: JALGAON DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Maharashtra that recorded the highest kernel infection of 37.50%.

entities.name: JUNAGADH DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Gujarat that recorded a high kernel infection of 35.00%.

entities.name: FARMING PRACTICES
entities.description: Human-managed agricultural activities that influence the infection levels of A. flavus.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: External physical and climatic factors that influence the infection levels of A. flavus.

entities.name: SOIL MICROBIOTA
entities.description: The community of microorganisms in the soil that influences A. flavus infection levels.

entities.name: HOST SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which the groundnut plant is vulnerable to infection by A. flavus.

entities.name: MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Region-specific approaches developed to control and manage A. flavus infection.
